violations.text: The non-food contact surfaces of the ice machine have an accumulation of bio-film. PIC stated ice machine will be cleaned by end of day. New Violation. Correct By: 03/28/2025
The coving/wall in the server station area is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 04/28/2025
Single service items are not being stored properly in their original protective package. New Violation. Correct By: 04/18/2024
The non-food contact surfaces of the shelves in the walk-in cooler have an accumulation of biofilm. New Violation. Correct By: 04/25/2024
The outside dumpster is not covered. Receptacles and waste handling units for refuse, recyclables, and returnables shall be kept covered. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/18/2024

The ceiling tiles and vents in the cook line and front prep area has an accumulation of dust and biofilm. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 04/25/2024
The floor in the beer walk-in cooler area is in poor repair (cracked and missing grout). The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 07/31/2024

Employees' clothing or other personal belongings were observed stored in the back prep and storage area. Lockers or other suitable facilities shall be used for the orderly storage of employees' clothing and other possessions. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/18/2024
